title: Additional Totems
body:
This mod adds more totems that change some of the more anoying mechanics in the late-game stage,  for example:

<details>
<summary>The Totem of Durability</summary>
When used removes durability from the users items.
</details>
<details>
<summary>The Totem of Safe Keeping</summary>
When used "keep inventory" gets turned on.
  (In my opinion the loss of items is the lategame is pretty annoying and sometimes takes away all fun.)
</details>

To unlock the recipes for thease totems you first need to kill an evoker.
